name: PostGrid API
what_it_does: PostGrid REST API — programmatic physical mail sending (letters, postcards, checks) and address verification, enabling agents to automate direct mail campaigns, compliance notices, and physical document delivery without manual print-and-mail workflows.
use_cases: Agents sending compliance notices and legal documents as certified physical mail for regulated industries
Automated billing statements — agents generating and mailing PDF invoices to customers without physical printer management
Direct mail campaigns — agents triggering personalized postcard mailings based on CRM segmentation and behavioral triggers
Address verification — agents validating and standardizing mailing addresses before data entry or physical mail sends
Check disbursement — agents programmatically printing and mailing checks for refunds, payouts, or vendor payments
not_for: Digital-only communications — use SendGrid or Twilio for email/SMS at fraction of the cost
International direct mail at scale — PostGrid is primarily US and Canada focused; international support is limited
Greeting card or gift mailings — use Thankster or Sendoso for personal/gifting physical mail use cases
best_when: You need to automate physical mail for compliance, legal notices, or direct mail campaigns where physical delivery is required or preferred.
avoid_when: Digital communication (email/SMS) meets your needs — physical mail is 50-100x more expensive per message than digital channels.

auth.notes: API key from PostGrid dashboard. Separate test and live API keys. Test mode simulates mail without physical sending — free for development. Live API key triggers actual mail printing and delivery at cost.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test mode: free unlimited sends (simulated); live mode: pay per piece
pricing.paid_tiers: Letters: from $1.25/piece; Postcards: from $0.80/piece; Checks: from $2.00/piece; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Pay-per-piece pricing with no monthly minimums. Volume discounts for 500+ pieces/month. Address verification: $0.007/verification. Competitive with Lob.com on pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API: 100 req/s; bulk sending available; print processing is async

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear API documentation with good examples. Error responses include descriptive messages. Test/live key distinction well-documented. Webhook events cover mail lifecycle (created, mailed, in-transit, delivered).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Mail creation with same idempotency key returns existing mail object — supports idempotency keys in POST requests. Address verification is idempotent. Live mail sends are irreversible once printing begins.
known_agent_gotchas: Live API key triggers real printing and billing — never use live key in development; test key is safe for all testing
Mail jobs are irreversible after submission — implement confirmation step before sending live mail batches
PDF template must be print-ready — safe zone margins and bleed areas required or mail may be rejected at print
Delivery tracking is approximate — USPS and Canada Post tracking is included but granularity varies by mail class
Address verification should run before mail creation — invalid addresses cause print job failures that still consume credits

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. HIPAA BAA available for healthcare physical mail. TLS enforced. Test/live key separation is good security design. No scope granularity — live key has full account access including billing. US and CA data processing.
